source_dataset: FEVER: a large-scale dataset for Fact Extraction and VERification
citation: Thorne, J. et al. (2018). FEVER: a large-scale dataset for Fact Extraction and VERification. NAACL.

records.claim: Apple Inc. was founded in 1976.
records.label: SUPPORTS

evidence.evidence_text: Apple Inc. was founded on April 1, 1976, by Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ronald Wayne.

records.claim: The Eiffel Tower is located in London.
records.label: REFUTES

evidence.evidence_text: The Eiffel Tower is a wrought-iron lattice tower on the Champ de Mars in Paris, France.

records.claim: Python was created by Guido van Rossum.
records.label: SUPPORTS

evidence.evidence_text: Python is a high-level programming language created by Guido van Rossum and first released in 1991.

records.claim: Amazon was founded in 2001.
records.label: REFUTES

evidence.evidence_text: Amazon was founded by Jeff Bezos on July 5, 1994, in Bellevue, Washington.

records.claim: The FIFA World Cup occurs every four years.
records.label: SUPPORTS

evidence.evidence_text: The FIFA World Cup is a quadrennial international football tournament.

records.claim: COVID-19 was first identified in 2020.
records.label: REFUTES

evidence.evidence_text: COVID-19 was first identified in Wuhan, China in December 2019.

records.claim: Tesla was co-founded by Elon Musk.
records.label: REFUTES

evidence.evidence_text: Tesla was founded in 2003 by Martin Eberhard and Marc Tarpenning; Elon Musk joined as chairman.

records.label: SUPPORTS

evidence.evidence_text: Bitcoin was invented in 2008 by an unknown person using the name Satoshi Nakamoto.

records.label: SUPPORTS

evidence.evidence_text: As of 2020, the European Union consists of 27 member states following Brexit.

evidence.evidence_text: Apple Inc. was founded on April 1, 1976, by Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ronald Wayne.

records.claim: The Eiffel Tower is located in London.
records.label: REFUTES

evidence.evidence_text: The Eiffel Tower is a wrought-iron lattice tower on the Champ de Mars in Paris, France.

records.claim: Python was created by Guido van Rossum.
records.label: SUPPORTS

evidence.evidence_text: Python is a high-level programming language created by Guido van Rossum and first released in 1991.

records.claim: Amazon was founded in 2001.
records.label: REFUTES

evidence.evidence_text: Amazon was founded by Jeff Bezos on July 5, 1994, in Bellevue, Washington.

records.claim: The FIFA World Cup occurs every four years.
records.label: SUPPORTS

evidence.evidence_text: The FIFA World Cup is a quadrennial international football tournament.

records.claim: COVID-19 was first identified in 2020.
records.label: REFUTES

evidence.evidence_text: COVID-19 was first identified in Wuhan, China in December 2019.

records.claim: Tesla was co-founded by Elon Musk.
records.label: REFUTES

evidence.evidence_text: Tesla was founded in 2003 by Martin Eberhard and Marc Tarpenning; Elon Musk joined as chairman.

records.claim: Bitcoin was created by Satoshi Nakamoto.
records.label: SUPPORTS

evidence.evidence_text: Bitcoin was invented in 2008 by an unknown person using the name Satoshi Nakamoto.

records.claim: The European Union has 27 member states.
records.label: SUPPORTS

evidence.evidence_text: As of 2020, the European Union consists of 27 member states following Brexit.
